1615.bio: He was born during the Prophet(ﷺ) life. He is considered as a Tabi'.

1670.full_name: 'Umayr bin Sa'id, son of the wife of al-Julas bin Suwayd bin bin al-Samit
1670.arabic: عمير بن سعيد / بن امرأة الجلاس
1670.mother_name: The wife of al-Julas bin Suwayd bin bin al-Samit
1670.bio: He was poor orphan boy under the care of Julas bin Suwayd bin bin al-Samit (A Hypocrite who later turned believer). 'Umayr bin Sa'id complained to Prophet(ﷺ) about al-Julas but he refused to accept his mistake. But when it is revealed in the Qu'ran then he accept his mistake and become good Muslim.

1671.full_name: al-Jullas bin Suwayd b. Samit b. Khalid b. 'Atiyya b. Hut b. Habib b. 'Amr b. 'Auf
1671.arabic: جلاس بن سويد بن الصامت الأنصاري
1671.bio: 'Umayr bin Sa'id, son of the wife of al-Julas bin Suwayd was poor orphan boy under the care of Julas bin Suwayd bin bin al-Samit (A Hypocrite who later turned believer). 'Umayr bin Sa'id complained to Prophet(ﷺ) about al-Julas but he refused to accept his mistake. But when it is revealed in the Qu'ran then he accept his mistake and become good Muslim.

1672.full_name: al-Harith bin Suwayd b. Samit b. Khalid b. 'Atiyya b. Hut b. Habib b. 'Amr b. 'Auf

1686.full_name: Sayfi/al-Harith/'Abdullah/Surma bin al-Aslat('Amir) b. Jusham b. Wa'il b. Zayd b. Qays b. 'Amr
1686.bio: There is some disagreement whether he accepted Islam or died before. It is said that he married his father's wife after the death of his father (in the days of ignorance).

1690.arabic: كبشة بنت معن بن عاصم الأنصارية

1692.bio: There is disagreement whether she accepted Islam or not.

1696.full_name: 'Abd 'Amr/'Amr bin Sayfi b.al-Nu'man b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b 'Auf
1696.bio:
Full Lineage: Abi 'Amir('Abd 'Amr) bin Sayfi b.al-Nu'man b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Auf b. 'Amr b. 'Auf b. Malik b. al-Aus
He may be one of the Hypocrites.
